x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Plan Application Fee
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Charged when a customer applies for a credit plan.

Comment:
Example: €50 fee to process a loan application.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Plan Processing Fee
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Covers the cost of evaluating and approving the credit plan.

Comment:
Example: 1% of the loan amount (€1,000 on a €100,000 loan).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Plan Maintenance Fee
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Recurring fee for managing and administering the credit plan.

Comment:
Example: €5 monthly service fee for a revolving credit account.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Plan Late Payment Fee
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Charged when the borrower fails to pay by the due date.

Comment:
Example: €25 penalty for late credit card payment.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Plan Early Payment Fee
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Charged if the borrower repays the credit earlier than agreed.

Comment:
Example: 2% of the remaining loan balance if repaid early.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Plan Adjustment Fee
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Covers administrative or compliance adjustments (e.g., rescheduling a credit plan).

Comment:
Example: €30 fee for changing the repayment schedule.
